title: Vegan Velvety Slovakian Butternut Squash Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew featuring roasted butternut squash and a blend of aromatic spices, served in a traditional Slovakian lacquerware bowl.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large clay pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, cumin, smoked paprika, caraway seeds, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the butternut squash and vegetable broth, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and cook for 20 minutes, or until the squash is tender.
Stir in the coconut cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Serve immediately, in traditional Slovakian lacquerware bowls.
Optional: Serve with crusty bread on the side for a satisfying accompaniment.
Note: Traditionally, this stew is cooked in a clay pot over an open flame, but a conventional oven or stovetop will also yield delicious results.
